name: io.github.easy8com/easy8-mcp
title: Easy8
description: Connect AI assistants to Easy8 — read and update projects, issues, and comments using your own Easy8 permissions, on your own Easy8 instance.

easy8_host.description: Hostname of your Easy8 instance, without protocol or trailing slash (e.g. yourcompany.easy8.com).

headers.name: X-Redmine-API-Key
headers.description: Your personal Easy8 API key, generated from your Easy8 user profile. The MCP endpoint inherits this account's permissions and project visibility.
